memberdef.definition: typedef void(* sip_supervisory_call_t) (const struct device *dev, unsigned long function_id, unsigned long arg0, unsigned long arg1, unsigned long arg2, unsigned long arg3, unsigned long arg4, unsigned long arg5, unsigned long arg6, struct arm_smccc_res *res)
memberdef.argsstring: )(const struct device *dev, unsigned long function_id, unsigned long arg0, unsigned long arg1, unsigned long arg2, unsigned long arg3, unsigned long arg4, unsigned long arg5, unsigned long arg6, struct arm_smccc_res *res)
memberdef.name: sip_supervisory_call_t

briefdescription.para: Callback API for executing the supervisory call See sip_supervisory_call() for argument description.

memberdef.definition: typedef bool(* sip_svc_plat_func_id_valid_t) (const struct device *dev, uint32_t command, uint32_t func_id)
memberdef.argsstring: )(const struct device *dev, uint32_t command, uint32_t func_id)
memberdef.name: sip_svc_plat_func_id_valid_t

briefdescription.para: Callback API for validating function id for the supervisory call.

memberdef.definition: typedef uint32_t(* sip_svc_plat_format_trans_id_t) (const struct device *dev, uint32_t client_idx, uint32_t trans_idx)
memberdef.argsstring: )(const struct device *dev, uint32_t client_idx, uint32_t trans_idx)
memberdef.name: sip_svc_plat_format_trans_id_t

briefdescription.para: Callback API for generating the transaction id from client id.

memberdef.definition: typedef uint32_t(* sip_svc_plat_get_trans_idx_t) (const struct device *dev, uint32_t trans_id)
memberdef.name: sip_svc_plat_get_trans_idx_t

briefdescription.para: Callback API for retrieving client transaction id from transaction id See sip_svc_plat_get_trans_idx() for argument description.

memberdef.definition: typedef void(* sip_svc_plat_update_trans_id_t) (const struct device *dev, struct sip_svc_request *request, uint32_t trans_id)
memberdef.argsstring: )(const struct device *dev, struct sip_svc_request *request, uint32_t trans_id)
memberdef.name: sip_svc_plat_update_trans_id_t

briefdescription.para: Callback API for updating transaction id for request packet for lower layer See sip_svc_plat_update_trans_id() for argument description.

memberdef.definition: typedef void(* sip_svc_plat_free_async_memory_t) (const struct device *dev, struct sip_svc_request *request)
memberdef.name: sip_svc_plat_free_async_memory_t

briefdescription.para: Callback API for freeing command buffer in ASYNC packets See sip_svc_plat_free_async_memory() for argument description.

memberdef.definition: typedef int(* sip_svc_plat_async_res_req_t) (const struct device *dev, unsigned long *a0, unsigned long *a1, unsigned long *a2, unsigned long *a3, unsigned long *a4, unsigned long *a5, unsigned long *a6, unsigned long *a7, char *buf, size_t size)
memberdef.argsstring: )(const struct device *dev, unsigned long *a0, unsigned long *a1, unsigned long *a2, unsigned long *a3, unsigned long *a4, unsigned long *a5, unsigned long *a6, unsigned long *a7, char *buf, size_t size)
memberdef.name: sip_svc_plat_async_res_req_t

briefdescription.para: Callback API to construct Polling packet for ASYNC transaction.

memberdef.definition: typedef int(* sip_svc_plat_async_res_res_t) (const struct device *dev, struct arm_smccc_res *res, char *buf, size_t *size, uint32_t *trans_id)
memberdef.argsstring: )(const struct device *dev, struct arm_smccc_res *res, char *buf, size_t *size, uint32_t *trans_id)
memberdef.name: sip_svc_plat_async_res_res_t

briefdescription.para: Callback API to check the response of polling request See sip_svc_plat_async_res_res() for argument description.

memberdef.definition: typedef uint32_t(* sip_svc_plat_get_error_code_t) (const struct device *dev, struct arm_smccc_res *res)
memberdef.name: sip_svc_plat_get_error_code_t

briefdescription.para: Callback API for retrieving error code from a supervisory call response.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, unsigned long function_id, unsigned long arg0, unsigned long arg1, unsigned long arg2, unsigned long arg3, unsigned long arg4, unsigned long arg5, unsigned long arg6, struct arm_smccc_res *res)
memberdef.name: sip_supervisory_call

briefdescription.para: supervisory call function which will execute the smc/hvc call

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the driver instance.
Function identifier for the supervisory call.
Pointer to response buffer for supervisory call.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, uint32_t command, uint32_t func_id)
memberdef.name: sip_svc_plat_func_id_valid

briefdescription.para: Validate the function id for the supervisory call.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the driver instance.
Command which specify if the call is SYNC or ASYNC.
if command and function identifiers are valid.
if command and function identifiers are invalid.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, uint32_t client_idx, uint32_t trans_idx)
memberdef.name: sip_svc_plat_format_trans_id

briefdescription.para: Formats and generates the transaction id from client id.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the driver instance.
id, which is used for tracking each transaction.

briefdescription.para: Retrieve client transaction id from packet transaction id.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the driver instance.
transaction identifier if for a transaction.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, struct sip_svc_request *request, uint32_t trans_id)
memberdef.name: sip_svc_plat_update_trans_id

briefdescription.para: Update transaction id for sip_svc_request for lower layer.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the driver instance.

briefdescription.para: Retrieve the error code from arm_smccc_res response.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the driver instance.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, unsigned long *a0, unsigned long *a1, unsigned long *a2, unsigned long *a3, unsigned long *a4, unsigned long *a5, unsigned long *a6, unsigned long *a7, char *buf, size_t size)
memberdef.name: sip_svc_plat_async_res_req

briefdescription.para: Set arguments for polling supervisory call.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the driver instance.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, struct arm_smccc_res *res, char *buf, size_t *size, uint32_t *trans_id)
memberdef.name: sip_svc_plat_async_res_res

briefdescription.para: Check the response of polling supervisory call and retrieve the response size and transaction id.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the driver instance.
Size of response in response buffer
on getting a valid polling response from supervisory call.
on no valid polling response from supervisory call.

briefdescription.para: Free the command buffer used for ASYNC packet after sending it to lower layers.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the driver instance.
